code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an astronaut (or related entities) into a single
    fluent English sentence.  Each predicate is mapped to a short phrase; the
    resulting clauses are concatenated with commas and a final “and”.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple mapping from predicate to a readable phrase.
    phrase_map = {
        "almaMater": "studied at",
        "birthDate": "was born on",
        "birthName": "was born as",
        "birthPlace": "was born in",
        "dateOfRetirement": "retired in",
        "occupation": "worked as",
        "status": "has status",
        "timeInSpace": "spent",
        "mission": "participated in mission",
        "selectedByNasa": "was selected by NASA in",
        "deathDate": "died on",
        "nationality": "was a citizen of",
        "servedAsChiefOfTheAstronautOfficeIn": "served as Chief of the Astronaut Office in",
        "title": "held the title",
        "ribbonAward": "received the ribbon award",
        "operator": "was operated by",
        "backupPilot": "had backup pilot",
        "commander": "was commanded by",
        "crewMembers": "had crew member",
        "representative": "was represented by",
        "alternativeName": "also known as",
        "awards": "received",
        "fossil": "has fossil",
        "senators": "has senator",
        "part": "is part of",
        "partsType": "has parts type",
        "higher": "is higher than",
        "isPartOf": "is part of",
        "bird": "has bird",
        "leader": "has leader",
        "affiliation": "is affiliated with",
        "competeIn": "competes in",
        "president": "has president",
        "award": "was awarded",
        "deathPlace": "died in",
        "gemstone": "has gemstone",
        "mascot": "has mascot",
        "cosparId": "has COSPAR ID",
        "utcOffset": "has UTC offset",
    }

    clauses = []
    for t in triples:
        phrase = phrase_map.get(t.predicate, t.predicate)
        # Special handling for timeInSpace to add a unit.
        if t.predicate == "timeInSpace":
            clause = f"{t.subject} {phrase} {t.object} minutes in space"
        else:
            clause = f"{t.subject} {phrase} {t.object}"
        clauses.append(clause)

    if len(clauses) == 1:
        return clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        # Join all but the last with commas, add “and” before the final clause.
        return ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
